about.description: At HungryDad, every individual finds a home where work doesn't feel like work. Come to our vibrant space packed with natural light and greenery. Our co-working fuels productivity and collaboration.

plansHeader.title: Membership Plans
plansHeader.description: One size never fits all when it comes to working. Whether you are a creative freelancer, an entrepreneur, a student or a small team of business mavericks, we have a membership plan that will work for you.

plans.name: Hot Desks
plans.description: A single desk you can book on a daily, weekly or monthly basis. Flexible, no long-term commitment — just show up and get to work.
plans.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="72" height="72"><rect x="8" y="36" width="48" height="6" rx="2"/><rect x="14" y="42" width="4" height="14" rx="1"/><rect x="46" y="42" width="4" height="14" rx="1"/><rect x="12" y="16" width="40" height="20" rx="2"/><circle cx="32" cy="26" r="4"/></svg>

plans.name: Private Offices
plans.description: A plug-and-play space for your team — lockable and exclusively yours. Ready from day one, so your team can hit the ground running.
plans.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 64 64" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" width="72" height="72"><rect x="6" y="10" width="52" height="40" rx="3"/><path d="M6 26h52"/><rect x="14" y="34" width="10" height="16"/><rect x="40" y="34" width="10" height="16"/><path d="M28 50V38h8v12"/><rect x="3" y="50" width="58" height="4" rx="1"/></svg>

amenities.name: High Speed WiFi
amenities.description: Blazing-fast fiber internet for uninterrupted work

amenities.name: Daily Housekeeping
amenities.description: Regular cleaning and maintenance so you can focus

amenities.name: Coffee & Tea
amenities.description: Freshly brewed drinks to keep you energised all day

amenities.name: Printing Service
amenities.description: Professional printing and scanning available at a fee
